title.zh: Unitree Go2 语音控制系统

summary.zh: 面向 Unitree Go2 机器狗的语音与文本控制原型，包含语音识别、语义解析、命令规划、安全检查、队列、Mock 执行和机器人适配层。
summary.en: A voice and text command prototype for a Unitree Go2 robot, designed around speech recognition, semantic parsing, command planning, safety checks, queueing, mock execution, and robot adapter layers.

zh: 设计从用户输入到机器人动作的命令流程。
构建安全检查和命令队列概念。
将 Mock 执行与未来机器人适配层分离。
en: Designed the command flow from user input to validated robot action.
Built the safety and command queue concepts for safer execution.
Separated mock execution from the future robot adapter.

zh: 语音与文本命令输入
语义意图解析
执行前安全校验
本地 Mock 执行路径
面向真实硬件的适配层
en: Speech and text command input
Semantic intent parsing
Safety validation before command execution
Mock execution path for local testing
Adapter layer for future hardware integration

zh: 在真实机器人部署前建立了可测试的控制原型。
明确了 UI、规划、安全和执行之间的系统边界。
en: Created a testable control prototype before live robot deployment.
Clarified system boundaries between UI, planning, safety, and execution.

title.zh: DVB-S / DVB-S2 MATLAB 通信系统仿真

summary.zh: 基于 MATLAB 的卫星通信系统仿真项目，覆盖链路预算、调制编码、BER 仿真和 DVB-S / DVB-S2 性能分析。
summary.en: A MATLAB-based satellite communication simulation project covering link budget, modulation and coding, BER simulation, and performance analysis for DVB-S and DVB-S2 workflows.

zh: 在 MATLAB 中实现仿真和分析流程。
通过 BER 测试比较调制与编码选择。
整理项目输出用于报告和展示。
en: Implemented simulation and analysis workflows in MATLAB.
Compared modulation and coding choices through BER-oriented tests.
Prepared project outputs for reporting and review.

zh: 链路预算计算
调制与编码仿真
BER 性能分析
结果可视化
en: Link budget calculation
Modulation and coding simulation
BER performance analysis
Result visualization

zh: 完成了可复现的通信系统仿真流程。
产出了适合技术报告使用的分析材料。
en: Completed a reproducible communication-system simulation workflow.
Produced analysis material suitable for technical reporting.

title.zh: 基于 YOLO 的番茄病虫害检测
title.en: Tomato Disease and Pest Detection using YOLO

summary.zh: 使用 YOLO 模型进行番茄病虫害目标检测，包含训练流程、检测结果查看和可视化展示。
summary.en: A YOLO-based object detection project for tomato disease and pest recognition, including model training, detection result review, and visual output presentation.

zh: 准备检测实验的模型流程。
查看训练输出和检测可视化。
整理项目结果用于展示。
en: Prepared the model workflow for detection experiments.
Reviewed training outputs and detection visualizations.
Organized project results for presentation.

zh: 目标检测流程
病虫害类别识别
训练结果可视化
检测输出查看
en: Object detection workflow
Disease and pest category recognition
Training result visualization
Detection output review

zh: 展示了农业检测方向的应用型计算机视觉流程。
形成了可继续扩展的作品集项目文档。
en: Demonstrated an applied computer-vision workflow for agricultural inspection.
Built portfolio-ready project documentation for future expansion.

summary.zh: 基于 Godot 的游戏原型，包含角色创建、背包、装备、技能、敌人 AI、对话、宝箱、世界选择和场景流程系统。
summary.en: A Godot game prototype with character creation, inventory, equipment, skills, enemy AI, dialogue, chests, world selection, and scene-flow systems.

zh: 在 Godot 中实现核心玩法和 UI 系统。
整理场景流程和可复用交互模式。
通过本地原型测试验证玩法功能。
en: Implemented core gameplay and UI systems in Godot.
Organized scene flow and reusable interaction patterns.
Validated gameplay features through local prototype testing.

zh: 角色创建流程
背包与装备系统
技能和交互 UI
敌人 AI 与对话原型
世界选择和场景切换
en: Character creation flow
Inventory and equipment systems
Skill and interaction UI
Enemy AI and dialogue prototypes
World selection and scene transitions

zh: 创建了可逐步扩展的游戏系统原型。
为后续玩法实验搭建了可复用系统。
en: Created a broad game-system prototype that can be expanded feature by feature.
Built reusable systems for future gameplay experiments.
